problems.diagnostic: Target (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL type names directly in expressions; port references must be to visible feature names
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Target.val with Target in the AGREE guarantee

problems.diagnostic: Actual (port spec) points to Types  speed.speed_impl (entity reference), which is not of an adequate kind
problems.cause: AGREE cannot reference AADL type names directly in expressions; port references must be to visible feature names
problems.minimal_edit: Replace Actual.val with Actual in the AGREE guarantee

executor_steps: Edit the AGREE annex block for Speed_Control to remove .val from Target and Actual
Change the guarantee expression from Actuator_Input = 1.0 * (Target.val - Actual.val) to Actuator_Input = 1.0 * (Target - Actual)
